payload.answer: SELECT queries are permitted (e.g., `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`), while DELETE operations on memory_cards are denied.
payload.conflict_classification: SQL capability conflict (select-only allowed, delete denied)

entity_resolution.reason: No persistent memory artifacts were provided or extracted; only a policy constraint was given.

payload.intent: Enforce Brain personal memory system policy in admin SQL select-only mode.

details: Admin policy indicates select-only access to memory_cards.
DELETE from memory_cards is explicitly denied.

repair_options: Use SELECT-only queries to inspect memory_cards (e.g., SELECT with LIMIT).
If modifications are required, route through an allowed write/update mechanism rather than DELETE.
